text: Now let's make the return value easier for dashboards. Return a list of tuples `(event_type, count)` sorted by descending count, then event_type alphabetically for ties.
So similar to sorted counts items with key count descending and type ascending?
Yes. Also, malformed lines should be ignored. Missing fields, non-integer timestamp, empty event id. Don't raise.
Okay. I will keep the window/set logic, add a small parser guard, and only change the return shape at the end.
Exactly. No testing framework yet; just update the function.
